title: llm.complete
description: JSON LLM completion. Prepends the JSON-API system prompt unless system_prompt is given, calls the configured provider and parses JSON out of the raw text. Returns {status: 'ok'|'failure', result?: object, comment?: string, reason?: string, usage?: {input_tokens, output_tokens}}.

system_prompt.description: Replaces the built-in JSON-API system prompt.

provider.description: Provider name from STAPEL_AGENT['PROVIDERS']; defaults to DEFAULT_PROVIDER.
